0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Migrate from Hindsight"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne v3.7.0 includes a ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hindsight importer"}]," that migrates memories from Hindsight self-hosted into Mnemosyne's episodic storage. Unlike the generic import path (which routes through ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]," and assigns current timestamps), the Hindsight importer writes directly to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"episodic_memory"}]," — preserving the full historical record."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"What Gets Preserved"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Hindsight Field"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne Destination"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mentioned_at"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"timestamp"}]," (original value)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"fact_type"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]," as ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hindsight:{fact_type}"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"tags"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]," (session tags extracted)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"chunk_id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Stable hash in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"proof_count"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"importance"}]," score bonus"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"metadata"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"context"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"entities"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"metadata_json"}]," (full preservation)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"hindsight_id"}]," in metadata"]}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Input Sources"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The importer accepts two input sources:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"JSON export file"}]," — a Hindsight export containing memories"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Live HTTP API"}]," — a running Hindsight instance at ",["$","code",null,{"children":"/v1/default/banks/{bank}/memories/list"}]]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"CLI Usage"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# From JSON export\nmnemosyne import-hindsight hindsight-export.json hermes\n\n# From live API\nmnemosyne import-hindsight http://localhost:8888 hermes\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Python API"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne.core.importers import HindsightImporter, import_from_hindsight\n\n# From JSON export\nimporter = HindsightImporter(file_path=\"hindsight-export.json\", bank=\"hermes\")\nresult = importer.run(mnemosyne)\n\n# From live API\nimporter = HindsightImporter(base_url=\"http://localhost:8888\", bank=\"hermes\")\nresult = importer.run(mnemosyne)\n\n# Convenience wrapper\nresult = import_from_hindsight(mnemosyne, file_path=\"export.json\", bank=\"hermes\")\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Result Object"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"result.provider      # \"hindsight\"\nresult.total         # Total items found\nresult.imported      # Successfully inserted\nresult.skipped       # Duplicates or empty content\nresult.failed        # Insertion errors\nresult.memory_ids    # List of imported memory IDs\nresult.errors        # List of error strings\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Duplicate Handling"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The importer uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"stable SHA256-based IDs"}]," with an ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hs_"}]," prefix. Re-importing the same export is idempotent — duplicates are skipped via ","$L3","."]}],"\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc"],["$Ld"],"$Le"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"3JiBHC7SpGPtZaaFYkqkO"}
3:["$","code",null,{"children":"INSERT OR IGNORE"}]

6:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"fact_type"}]}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Base Importance"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"world"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.75"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"experience"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.65"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"observation"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.55"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"(other)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.50"}]]}]]}]]}]
7:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"proof_count"}]," adds up to 0.15 bonus (capped at 1.0)."]}]
8:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Provider Registry"}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":"Hindsight is registered as the 7th supported provider:"}]
